isFastFoodModelNote: Limited-service / order-ahead app model (order & pay before pickup, primarily takeout); confirm with legal before relying for Fair Workweek.

national._note: locationCount = open/operating retail establishments. See breakdown for planned/closed and all-status totals; choose the count appropriate to each rule.

jurisdictions._floorAreaCoverage: sqft known for 20/30 NYC retail stores

floorArea._unit: sqft (converted from ops m² x10.7639; rounded to whole sqft)

coverageNote: Floor area known for 20/30 retail stores; 10 stores carry placeholder values (1111/11111 m²) in the ops system and are emitted as null (not guessed). Area is converted from t_shop_resource.square_size (usable area, square METERS) to sqft (x10.7639); values must be verified against leases / certificates of occupancy before driving a compliance determination. All retail stores are in New York City (18 open, 7 planned, 5 closed/withdrawn). 3 internal test/commissary kitchens (internal=1) are excluded from the roster. No structured health-permit / CAMIS / DOH facility numbers exist in the ops DB (only scanned food-business-licence images); dohEstablishmentId and licenseNumbers are null/empty and must be sourced from DOH (CAMIS lookup by address). Status enum inferred from data (1=open w/ open date, 2=planned no open date, 5=closed/withdrawn never opened) — QA to confirm. Roster is UNREVIEWED (reviewed=false).
